libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are needed. Tests should cover resources actually packaged in org.clojure:google-closure-library-third-party:0.0-1376-2, such as goog/caja, goog/dojo, goog/mochikit, goog/loremipsum, goog/osapi, and goog/silverlight files. Do not assume goog/base.js or goog/deps.js are present in this third-party artifact; those belong to the companion org.clojure:google-closure-library artifact and adding it would risk masking coverage of the target artifact.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8743 [Automation] java run fails for org.clojure:google-closure-library-third-party:0.0-1376-2; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Version 0.0-1376-2 no longer packages goog/base.js or goog/deps.js, so tests copied from 0.0-1376 that assert those files will fail.
Because this artifact contains JavaScript/resources rather than Java APIs, meaningful coverage is likely limited to classpath resource availability and content/integration assertions.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required: the artifact is a resource-only Maven distribution of Closure Library third-party JavaScript files with no declared dependencies, Docker service, or environment/system-property requirements.
